// ts-bridge.gg — generated from exported TypeScript function 'heavy_compute_pipeline'
(heavy_compute_pipeline_entry_00_fn:PolyglotBridgeEntry)-[:PROCESS]->(heavy_compute_pipeline_call_01_cleaned:PolyglotBridgeCall)
(heavy_compute_pipeline_call_01_cleaned:PolyglotBridgeCall)-[:PROCESS]->(heavy_compute_pipeline_call_02_mapped:PolyglotBridgeCall)
(heavy_compute_pipeline_call_02_mapped:PolyglotBridgeCall)-[:PROCESS]->(heavy_compute_pipeline_call_03_reduced:PolyglotBridgeCall)

transpiledSources.lua:
cleaned = dataset:filter(config)
mapped = apply_transform(cleaned)
reduced = aggregate(mapped)
return reduced
transpiledSources.kotlin:
val cleaned = dataset.filter(config)
val mapped = apply_transform(cleaned)
val reduced = aggregate(mapped)
return reduced
transpiledSources.php:
cleaned = dataset->filter(config)
mapped = apply_transform(cleaned)
reduced = aggregate(mapped)
return reduced
transpiledSources.ruby:
cleaned = dataset.filter(config)
mapped = apply_transform(cleaned)
reduced = aggregate(mapped)
return reduced
transpiledSources.gnot:
using
  typescript

is polyglot_translation
  cleaned <- typescript, do(dataset_filter(config))
  mapped <- typescript, do(apply_transform(cleaned))
  reduced <- typescript, do(aggregate(mapped))
  yield reduced
transpiledSources.fortran:
cleaned = dataset%filter(config)
mapped = apply_transform(cleaned)
reduced = aggregate(mapped)
RETURN reduced
transpiledSources.elixir:
let cleaned = filter dataset config in
let mapped = apply_transform cleaned in
let reduced = aggregate mapped in
reduced
transpiledSources.lean:
let cleaned = filter dataset config in
let mapped = apply_transform cleaned in
let reduced = aggregate mapped in
reduced
transpiledSources.go:
cleaned := dataset.filter(config)
mapped := apply_transform(cleaned)
reduced := aggregate(mapped)
return reduced

// Convergence Inspection & Loop Back
(convergence_check: ConvergenceCheck { theorem: 'void_walkers_converge' })
(prev_winners)-[:FORK]->(convergence_check)
(curr_winners)-[:FORK]->(convergence_check)
(converged: Converged { regime: 'climax_community' })
(not_converged: NotConverged { regime: 'succession' })
(convergence_check)-[:FORK]->(converged | not_converged)

// Inspection Pipeline (User can Pause on NotConverged loops!)
(inspection: InspectionGate { status: 'pausable', view: 'internal_state' })
(shift_winners: ShiftState { op: 'curr_to_prev' })
(not_converged)-[:PROCESS]->(inspection)
(inspection)-[:PROCESS]->(shift_winners)
(shift_winners)-[:PROCESS]->(prev_winners)
(increment: IncrementGeneration)
(shift_winners)-[:PROCESS]->(increment)
(increment)-[:PROCESS]->(generation)
(compose_winners: ComposeWinners { strategy: 'best_per_function' })
(curr_winners)-[:PROCESS]->(compose_winners)
(compose_winners)-[:PROCESS]->(source)

// Output Pipeline when Converged
(optimal_mix: OptimalMix { theorem: 'diversity_optimality_master' })
(converged)-[:PROCESS]->(optimal_mix)
(emit_compiler: EmitCompiler { format: 'polyglot_gg' })
(optimal_mix)-[:PROCESS]->(emit_compiler)
(terminal)-[:FOLD]->(emit_compiler)
